Symptom_2: Thyroid Stimulating Hormone ($\text{TSH}$) suppression in thyroid cancer
Side_Effect: Signs of hyperthyroidism: Palpitations, weight loss, heat intolerance, tremor, insomnia.
Dosage: Highly individualized; Initial: 1.6 $\mu\text{g}/\text{kg}/\text{day}$. Maintenance: 75 $\mu\text{g}$ to 150 $\mu\text{g}$ once daily (on an empty stomach).

Side_Effect: Dizziness, somnolence, asthenia, tremor, abdominal pain. Serious: Seizures in patients without epilepsy (Off-label use), status epilepticus.
Dosage: Initial: 4 $\text{mg}$ once daily. Maintenance: 32 $\text{mg}$ to 56 $\text{mg}$ daily (in 2-4 doses).

Symptom_1: Treatment of Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) (primarily used outside $\text{US}$)
Side_Effect: Nausea, constipation, dry mouth, headache, dizziness. Serious: Potential for misuse/abuse (opioid receptor interaction).
Uses: Selective Serotonin Reuptake Enhancer ($\text{SSRE}$) / $\text{Mu}$-Opioid Receptor Agonist
Dosage: 12.5 $\text{mg}$ three times daily.

Symptom_1: Prevention of thrombotic events (e.g., $\text{MI}$, stroke, $\text{CV}$ death) in Acute Coronary Syndrome ($\text{ACS}$)
Symptom_2: Prevention of recurrent events in stable coronary artery disease
Side_Effect: Dyspnea (shortness of breath), headache, nausea, bleeding. Serious: Significant bleeding risk ($\text{Black Box Warning}$).
Dosage: $\text{ACS}$: 180 $\text{mg}$ loading dose, then 90 $\text{mg}$ twice daily for 1 year. Maintenance: 60 $\text{mg}$ twice daily.

Symptom_1: Prevention of thrombotic stroke in patients intolerant to Aspirin
Symptom_2: Prevention of subacute stent thrombosis (in combination with Aspirin)
Side_Effect: Diarrhea, rash. Serious: Severe Neutropenia, $\text{TTP}$ (Thrombotic Thrombocytopenic Purpura) - $\text{Black Box Warning}$. (Rarely used now).
Dosage: 250 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (with food).

Symptom_1: Treatment of complicated skin and soft tissue infections ($\text{cSSTI}$)
Symptom_2: Treatment of complicated intra-abdominal infections ($\text{cIAI}$), Community-acquired pneumonia ($\text{CAP}$)
Side_Effect: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea. Serious: Increased mortality ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - Reserve for limited options, pancreatitis, $\text{C}$. difficile infection.
Price: Extremely High Cost; Hospital/IV use only
Dosage: 100 $\text{mg}$ IV load, then 50 $\text{mg}$ IV every 12 hours.

Symptom_1: Treatment of chronic open-angle Glaucoma (Eye drops)
Side_Effect: Eye drops: Local irritation, ocular burning/stinging. Oral: Bradycardia, fatigue. Serious: Bronchospasm (systemic absorption from drops).
Dosage: Eye drops: 1 drop twice daily. Oral: 10 $\text{mg}$ to 20 $\text{mg}$ twice daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of susceptible Protozoal Infections (e.g., Giardiasis, Trichomoniasis)
Symptom_2: Treatment of susceptible anaerobic Bacterial Infections
Side_Effect: Metallic taste, nausea, vomiting, $\text{GI}$ upset. Serious: Disulfiram-like reaction with alcohol.
Dosage: Single 2 $\text{g}$ dose (Trichomoniasis). 500 $\text{mg}$ twice daily for 5 days (Giardiasis).

Symptom_1: Treatment of acute deep vein Thrombosis ($\text{DVT}$) or pulmonary Embolism ($\text{PE}$)
Side_Effect: Bleeding, injection site reactions, bruising. Serious: $\text{HIT}$ (Heparin-Induced Thrombocytopenia), spinal/epidural hematoma ($\text{Black Box Warning}$).
Dosage: $\text{DVT/PE}$: 175 $\text{anti-Xa}$ $\text{IU}/\text{kg}$ SC once daily. Prophylaxis: Varies.

Side_Effect: Dry mouth, $\text{URI}$ symptoms. Serious: Acute narrow-angle glaucoma, urinary retention.
Dosage: Inhalation: 1 puff (18 $\mu\text{g}$) once daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of $\text{HIV-1}$ Infection (in combination therapy, especially for resistant strains)
Side_Effect: Diarrhea, nausea, vomiting, headache. Serious: Hepatotoxicity ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - including fatal hepatic failure, $\text{ICH}$ (Intracranial Hemorrhage), metabolic disturbances.
Dosage: 500 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (always boosted with 200 $\text{mg}$ Ritonavir).

Symptom_1: Management of Spasticity (due to $\text{MS}$, spinal cord injury, etc.)
Side_Effect: Drowsiness, dry mouth, dizziness, hypotension. Serious: Severe hypotension, hepatotoxicity.
Uses: Alpha-2 Adrenergic Agonist (Centrally Acting Muscle Relaxant)
Dosage: Initial: 2 $\text{mg}$ three times daily. Max: 36 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of serious susceptible Gram-negative Bacterial Infections (e.g., $\text{P}$. aeruginosa)
Symptom_2: Inhaled treatment of $\text{P}$. aeruginosa infection in Cystic Fibrosis
Side_Effect: Serious: Ototoxicity (hearing loss/vestibular damage), Nephrotoxicity ($\text{Black Box Warning}$), neuromuscular blockade.
Dosage: IV: Dosing complex, based on $\text{kg}$ (often once daily). Inhaled: 300 $\text{mg}$ twice daily.

Side_Effect: Hypoglycemia (low blood sugar), $\text{GI}$ upset, weight gain. First-generation $\text{SU}$ (less common now) - long half-life.
Dosage: 500 $\text{mg}$ to 1000 $\text{mg}$ two to three times daily.

Symptom_1: Adjunct treatment of Parkinson's Disease (with Levodopa/Carbidopa)
Side_Effect: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, orthostatic hypotension, dyskinesia. Serious: Fulminant Fatal Hepatotoxicity ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - use limited and requires monitoring.
Dosage: 100 $\text{mg}$ to 200 $\text{mg}$ three times daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Overactive Bladder ($\text{OAB}$) (Urinary frequency, urgency, incontinence)
Side_Effect: Dry mouth, constipation, headache, dizziness.
Dosage: 2 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (IR) or 2 $\text{mg}$ to 4 $\text{mg}$ once daily (ER).

Symptom_1: Treatment of generalized and partial Seizures (Epilepsy)
Symptom_2: Prophylaxis of Migraine, Off-label: Bipolar Disorder, Weight loss
Side_Effect: Paresthesia (tingling), cognitive slowing ("dopey"), weight loss, $\text{GI}$ upset. Serious: Acute angle closure glaucoma, kidney stones, hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis.
Dosage: Migraine: 50 $\text{mg}$ to 100 $\text{mg}$ twice daily. Epilepsy: Slowly titrated up to 400 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Edema (Fluid retention) due to $\text{CHF}$, Renal/Hepatic Disease
Side_Effect: Hypokalemia, hypochloremia, ototoxicity, increased $\text{uric acid}$. More predictable bioavailability than Furosemide.
Dosage: Edema: 10 $\text{mg}$ to 20 $\text{mg}$ once daily. $\text{HTN}$: 5 $\text{mg}$ to 10 $\text{mg}$ once daily.

Symptom_1: Management of moderate to severe Pain
Side_Effect: Nausea, vomiting, dizziness, constipation, somnolence. Serious: Seizure risk (dose-dependent), Serotonin Syndrome, dependence/abuse.
Dosage: 50 $\text{mg}$ to 100 $\text{mg}$ every 4-6 hours as needed (Max 400 $\text{mg}$/day).

Symptom_1: Treatment of refractory Major Depressive Disorder (MDD)
Side_Effect: Orthostatic hypotension, dizziness, insomnia, weight gain. Serious: Hypertensive Crisis (with tyramine-rich foods) - $\text{Black Box Warning}$, Serotonin Syndrome.
Dosage: 30 $\text{mg}$ daily (in divided doses). Max 60 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Side_Effect: Infusion reactions (fever, chills), headache, diarrhea. Serious: Cardiomyopathy/Heart Failure ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - requires $\text{LVEF}$ monitoring.
Price: Extremely High Cost; Oncology IV Infusion/SC
Dosage: IV: Loading dose, then weekly or every 3 weeks (Dosing complex based on $\text{kg}/\text{m}^2$).

Symptom_2: Treatment of Insomnia (due to high sedation) (Off-label)
Side_Effect: Marked sedation/drowsiness, dizziness, dry mouth, orthostatic hypotension. Serious: Priapism (prolonged painful erection), $\text{QT}$ prolongation, Serotonin Syndrome.
Dosage: Depression: 150 $\text{mg}$ to 400 $\text{mg}$ daily. Insomnia: 50 $\text{mg}$ to 100 $\text{mg}$ at bedtime.

Symptom_1: Treatment of various Inflammatory and Allergic Conditions (Systemic, Topical, Inhaled)
Symptom_2: Intralesional injection for keloids, Treatment of $\text{Allergic Rhinitis}$ (Nasal)
Side_Effect: Local: Skin atrophy (Topical), hoarseness (Inhaled). Systemic: Weight gain, $\text{GI}$ upset, mood changes.
Dosage: Topical: Apply one to three times daily. Systemic: Dose highly individualized.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Edema associated with $\text{CHF}$, Cirrhosis, Nephrotic Syndrome
Side_Effect: Hyperkalemia, nausea, vomiting, dizziness. Serious: Kidney stone formation, megaloblastic anemia.
Dosage: 100 $\text{mg}$ to 300 $\text{mg}$ daily (in 1-2 doses).

Symptom_1: Treatment of all forms of Parkinson's Disease
Side_Effect: Dry mouth, blurred vision, constipation, urinary retention, confusion/hallucinations (especially in elderly).
Dosage: $\text{PD}$: 6 $\text{mg}$ to 10 $\text{mg}$ daily (in 3-4 doses). $\text{EPS}$: 5 $\text{mg}$ to 15 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of acute uncomplicated Urinary Tract Infections (UTI)
Side_Effect: Nausea, vomiting, rash, pruritus (itching). Serious: $\text{Megaloblastic}$ anemia (due to $\text{Folate}$ inhibition), hyperkalemia.
Dosage: 100 $\text{mg}$ to 200 $\text{mg}$ twice daily for 3-10 days.

Symptom_2: Treatment of chronic Insomnia (due to strong sedative properties)
Side_Effect: Marked sedation, dizziness, dry mouth, blurred vision, constipation, orthostatic hypotension. Less cardiovascular toxicity than other TCAs.
Dosage: 50 $\text{mg}$ to 150 $\text{mg}$ daily (usually at night). Max 300 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Overactive Bladder ($\text{OAB}$) (Urinary frequency, urgency, incontinence)
Side_Effect: Dry mouth, constipation, headache. Does not easily cross $\text{BBB}$ (fewer $\text{CNS}$ side effects).
Dosage: 20 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (IR) or 60 $\text{mg}$ once daily (ER).

Symptom_1: Treatment of serious susceptible Bacterial Infections (Historical use)
Side_Effect: Nausea, dizziness. Serious: Fatal Hepatotoxicity ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - Use limited to severe, life-threatening infections when benefits outweigh risk. (Rarely used/withdrawn).
Dosage: 200 $\text{mg}$ to 300 $\text{mg}$ once daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of moderate to severe Plaque Psoriasis
Symptom_2: Treatment of active Psoriatic Arthritis and Crohn's Disease
Side_Effect: $\text{URI}$, headache, fatigue, injection site reaction. Serious: Serious infections (including Tuberculosis), malignancy risk.
Price: Extremely High Cost; Specialty SC/IV Injection
Dosage: Psoriasis: 45 $\text{mg}$ SC initial, 4 weeks later, then every 12 weeks. $\text{Crohn's}$: $\text{IV}$ load, then $\text{SC}$ maintenance.

Symptom_1: Treatment of $\text{Herpes}$ Simplex Virus ($\text{HSV}$) infections (Genital $\text{Herpes}$, Cold Sores)
Side_Effect: Headache, nausea, abdominal pain. Prodrug of Acyclovir (better bioavailability).
Dosage: $\text{HSV}$: 1 $\text{g}$ twice daily for 7-10 days. $\text{Shingles}$: 1 $\text{g}$ three times daily for 7 days.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Cytomegalovirus ($\text{CMV}$) Retinitis in $\text{AIDS}$ patients
Symptom_2: Prophylaxis against $\text{CMV}$ disease in transplant recipients
Side_Effect: Leukopenia/Neutropenia, anemia, thrombocytopenia, diarrhea. Serious: Bone Marrow Suppression ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - Teratogenic. Prodrug of Ganciclovir.
Dosage: $\text{CMV}$ Retinitis: 900 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (induction), then 900 $\text{mg}$ once daily (maintenance).

Symptom_2: Treatment of Heart Failure, Post-$\text{MI}$ management
Side_Effect: Dizziness, headache, fatigue. Serious: Angioedema, hyperkalemia, renal impairment. History of recalls due to impurity ($\text{NDMA}$).
Dosage: 80 $\text{mg}$ to 320 $\text{mg}$ once daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of serious susceptible Gram-positive Bacterial Infections ($\text{MRSA}$, $\text{C}$. difficile)
Side_Effect: IV: Nephrotoxicity, ototoxicity, $\text{Red Man Syndrome}$ (infusion-related flushing). Oral: Nausea, vomiting (minimal systemic absorption).
Price: High Cost; Hospital/IV use; Oral for $\text{C}$. difficile
Dosage: IV: Dosing complex, based on $\text{kg}$ and $\text{TDM}$. Oral: 125 $\text{mg}$ to 500 $\text{mg}$ four times daily for 10 days ($\text{C}$. difficile).

Side_Effect: Headache, flushing, dyspepsia, nasal congestion. Serious: Sudden hearing/vision loss, Priapism, severe hypotension (contraindicated with Nitrates). Intermediate duration of action.
Dosage: 5 $\text{mg}$ to 20 $\text{mg}$ as needed (1 hour before activity).

Side_Effect: Nausea (dose-dependent), insomnia, abnormal dreams. Serious: Serious Neuropsychiatric events ($\text{Black Box Warning}$) - caution with pre-existing mental illness.
Dosage: Initial: Slowly titrated up to 1 $\text{mg}$ twice daily. Treatment duration 12-24 weeks.

Symptom_1: Treatment of unresectable or metastatic melanoma ($\text{BRAF}$ $\text{V600E}$ mutation positive)
Side_Effect: Arthralgia (joint pain), rash, photosensitivity, fatigue, headache. Serious: $\text{QT}$ prolongation, development of new cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma ($\text{cuSCC}$).
Price: Extremely High Cost; Oncology use only
Dosage: 960 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (take with or without food).

Symptom_2: Treatment of Generalized Anxiety Disorder ($\text{GAD}$), Panic Disorder
Side_Effect: Nausea, vomiting, dizziness, headache, insomnia, hypertension (dose-dependent), sexual dysfunction.
Dosage: Initial: 75 $\text{mg}$ daily (ER). Max 225 $\text{mg}$ daily.

Symptom_1: Treatment of Hypertension and Angina Pectoris
Symptom_2: Treatment of various Supraventricular Arrhythmias (e.g., $\text{AF}$ rate control), Cluster Headache prophylaxis
Side_Effect: Constipation, dizziness, bradycardia, hypotension. Serious: Worsening heart failure (contraindicated in $\text{HFrEF}$).
Dosage: 120 $\text{mg}$ to 480 $\text{mg}$ daily (divided doses or $\text{ER}$). $\text{IV}$ for acute arrhythmias.

Symptom_1: Adjunctive treatment of refractory Complex Partial Seizures
Side_Effect: Drowsiness, dizziness, fatigue, weight gain. Serious: Permanent vision loss ($\text{VFL}$) - $\text{Black Box Warning}$ (requires $\text{REMS}$ program and monitoring).
Dosage: Initial: 500 $\text{mg}$ twice daily. Maintenance: 1 $\text{g}$ to 3 $\text{g}$ twice daily.

Side_Effect: Diarrhea, nausea, insomnia, vomiting, sexual dysfunction. Must be taken with food.
Dosage: Initial: 10 $\text{mg}$ daily. Maintenance: 20 $\text{mg}$ to 40 $\text{mg}$ once daily.

Symptom_2: Treatment of serious $\text{Candida}$ infections (including resistant strains)
Side_Effect: Visual disturbances (transient blurring/color change), fever, rash, headache. Serious: Hepatotoxicity, $\text{QT}$ prolongation, phototoxicity.
Dosage: IV: 6 $\text{mg}/\text{kg}$ twice daily (load), then 4 $\text{mg}/\text{kg}$ twice daily. Oral: 200 $\text{mg}$ to 300 $\text{mg}$ twice daily.

Symptom_1: Prophylaxis and treatment of venous Thromboembolism ($\text{DVT}/\text{PE}$)
Symptom_2: Prevention of stroke in Atrial Fibrillation ($\text{AF}$), Mechanical Heart Valves
Side_Effect: Bleeding (major complication), bruising. Serious: Major/Fatal Bleeding, Skin Necrosis ($\text{Black Box Warning}$). Requires strict $\text{INR}$ monitoring.
Dosage: Highly individualized (initial dose 2 $\text{mg}$ to 5 $\text{mg}$ daily). Maintenance adjusted to target $\text{INR}$.

Symptom_1: Prophylaxis and chronic treatment of Asthma
Side_Effect: Headache, nausea, pharyngitis, $\text{URI}$. Serious: $\text{Churg-Strauss}$ syndrome (rare, mostly upon withdrawal of corticosteroids), hepatotoxicity.
Dosage: 20 $\text{mg}$ twice daily (on an empty stomach).

Symptom_1: Short-term treatment of Insomnia (difficulty falling asleep)
Side_Effect: Dizziness, headache, somnolence. Ultra-short half-life (minimal next-day sedation). Risk of dependence/abuse.
Dosage: 5 $\text{mg}$ to 10 $\text{mg}$ at bedtime (only if 4+ hours of sleep possible).

Symptom_1: Treatment of HIV-1 Infection (part of combination therapy)
Side_Effect: Headache, nausea, vomiting, myalgia, nail discoloration. Serious: Myelosuppression (Neutropenia, severe anemia) - $\text{Black Box Warning}$, $\text{Lactic}$ acidosis/Steatosis.
Dosage: 300 $\text{mg}$ twice daily.

Symptom_2: Treatment and prevention of Osteoporosis, Bone metastases in Cancer
Side_Effect: Fever, bone pain, fatigue. Serious: $\text{ONJ}$ (Osteonecrosis of the Jaw), renal toxicity.
Price: Extremely High Cost; Specialty IV Injection
Dosage: Osteoporosis: 5 $\text{mg}$ IV infusion once a year. Hypercalcemia: 4 $\text{mg}$ IV single dose.

Symptom_1: Short-term treatment of Insomnia (difficulty falling asleep or maintaining sleep)
Side_Effect: Drowsiness, dizziness, headache. Serious: Complex sleep behaviors (e.g., sleep-driving) - $\text{Black Box Warning}$, dependence/abuse.
Dosage: 5 $\text{mg}$ to 10 $\text{mg}$ at bedtime (only if 7-8 hours of sleep possible).

Side_Effect: Nausea,Stomach pain
Dosage: 500-1000 mg every 4-6 hours

Side_Effect: Heartburn,Dizziness
Dosage: 200-400 mg every 4-6 hours

Side_Effect: Diarrhea,Rash
Dosage: 250-500 mg every 8 hours

Side_Effect: Drowsiness,Dry mouth
Dosage: 10 mg once daily

Side_Effect: Headache,Diarrhea
Dosage: 40 mg once daily before breakfast

Side_Effect: Nausea,Liver damage (overdose)
Dosage: 650 mg every 6 hours

Side_Effect: Constipation,Headache
Dosage: 4-8 mg every 8 hours

Side_Effect: Nausea,Stomach pain
Dosage: 500 mg once daily for 3 days

Side_Effect: Drowsiness,Dizziness
Uses: Relief from cold, cough, and allergy symptoms
Dosage: 25-50 mg every 4-6 hours

Side_Effect: Stomach ulcers,Drowsiness
Uses: Treats muscle aches and period pain
Dosage: 250-500 mg three times daily
